hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, os
state_file = '/home/user/Claud/projects/hairlove/team-state.md'
log_file = '/home/user/Claud/projects/hairlove/progress.log'
try:
    with open(state_file) as f:
        state = f.read()
except:
    state = 'team-state.md не найден'
try:
    with open(log_file) as f:
        lines = f.readlines()
    log = ''.join(lines[-10:])  # последние 10 записей
except:
    log = 'progress.log не найден'
context = '=== ПАМЯТЬ ПРОЕКТА (загружена автоматически) ===\n\n## team-state.md\n' + state + '\n\n## Последние записи progress.log:\n' + log + '\n=== КОНЕЦ ПАМЯТИ ==='
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': context}}))
"

python3 -c "
from datetime import datetime
log_file = '/home/user/Claud/projects/hairlove/progress.log'
timestamp = datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M')
entry = timestamp + ' ⚠️ [coordinator] Сессия завершена/прервана\n'
try:
    with open(log_file, 'a') as f:
        f.write(entry)
except Exception as e:
    pass
" 2>/dev/null || true
